case_payload.summary: System receives a life situation (client requesting free edits, repeated conflict) and collapses into generic advice ('you should have a conversation', 'set boundaries') instead of producing a COM-Log.
case_payload.claim_attempt: The system should provide advice on how to handle the situation with the client.

why: The system is supposed to produce a COM-Log, not generic advice.
The claim attempts to change the output format of the system.
The guard blocks the claim because it would result in non-COM-Log output.
